creator: greg@codeconcepts.com
text: The tree(2) man page mentions neither the RB_FOREACH_SAFE() nor the RB_FOREACH_REVERSE_SAFE(), yet they are clearly included in /usr/include/sys/tree.h.  Not a problem for anyone familiar with the API, but useful to those reading man pages to understand the scope its scope and capabilities.  Also, good for completeness :-)
